variations.reason: SE-DC procurement restricted to approved regional supplier programs per GlobalMart sourcing policy
SE-DC requires lot/batch tracking for food safety traceability per GlobalMart cold chain policy. Format: LOT-YYYY-MMDD-XX
variations.site_override: Mandatory for all perishable category items

variations.reason: SE-DC has lower approval threshold for perishables due to spoilage risk and cold chain compliance requirements
variations.site_override: 3-tier approval for amounts > $25K on perishable categories

variations.enterprise_default: Any valid storage location for the plant
variations.reason: Perishable items must be received into the correct temperature zone for cold chain integrity and food safety compliance
variations.site_override: Must match product category temperature zone (Zone-F=Frozen, Zone-R=Refrigerated, Zone-A=Ambient)

actions: Record receiving dock temperature (must be within acceptable range)
Check expiry date (must meet minimum shelf life requirement)
Material blocked from store distribution until inspection verified
variations.reason: SE-DC policy requires quality inspection including temperature verification, packaging integrity, and expiry date check before stock integration
variations.site_override: Mandatory quality inspection for perishable and private-label goods

variations.reason: Cold chain integrity verification ensures product was maintained at proper temperature during transit
variations.site_override: Mandatory temperature recording at receiving dock for all perishable goods
